precheck.description: verify extension "postgis" is not already enabled
precheck.sql: SELECT NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 AS "one" FROM "pg_extension" WHERE "extname" = $1) AS "result"

execute.sql: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS postgis

postcheck.sql: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 AS "one" FROM "pg_extension" WHERE "extname" = $1) AS "result"
